name: Dandridge
description: Dandridge is the county seat of Jefferson County and one of the oldest towns in Tennessee, situated on the shores of Douglas Lake. Tristar Locksmith extends service to Dandridge for car lockouts, home rekeying, lock replacement, and emergency locksmith needs. The scenic drive along the lake and the town's historic character make it a pleasure to serve, and we take pride in supporting this tight-knit community.
